stemHtml: A pilot is on a VFR navigation flight to FREETOWN, which is a controlled aerodrome. He/she carefully prepared all radio COM and NAV frequencies on a piece of paper, but he/she CANNOT find the paper any more. Luckily, on the VFR map, he/she finds the following frequencies: FRT TWR 126.305 FRT GND 118.680 FREETOWN FRT 116.35. Which frequency must he/she select in order to use the radio navigation aid to FREETOWN?

options.a: 126.305 MHz or 118.680 MHz, depending on the CTR entry point.
